unit.name: WP_Http request orchestration behavior
unit.area: src/wp-includes/class-wp-http.php with WP_HTTP_Requests_Hooks, WP_HTTP_Requests_Response, WP_HTTP_Proxy, WP_HTTP_Response, and WP_Http_Cookie support
unit.public_contract: This fixture executes copied WordPress 7.0 WP_Http request orchestration in isolated PHP CLI probes. It observes default/filter argument construction, preemptive responses, invalid/blocked request errors, streaming path checks, headers/cookies/SSL option handoff, Requests exception conversion, nonblocking response shape, debug actions, and response filtering through a deterministic Requests boundary without claiming live Requests network I/O, real DNS/proxy/TLS behavior, transport execution, redirect following, installed distribution behavior, or generated public PHP ownership.

bridge.removal_gate: Replace copied public PHP with generated original-path adapters and pass request orchestration, selected upstream HTTP PHPUnit, installed distribution, and live/recorded network parity gates before claiming public PHP ownership.
